body.body: Add check_claude_balance tool to ~/TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/tools/browser.py. Uses browse_as_employer to navigate to https://console.anthropic.com/settings/billing, scrapes the credit balance number, writes {"balance_usd": X.XX, "fetched_at": ISO-timestamp} to ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/anthropic_balance.json. Register as Tool with name=check_claude_balance. caller_source should be passed through — use repl/web only. Log start/complete/error to browser_use.log. Return balance as string.
body.title: D088: check_claude_balance Igor tool
body.result: check_claude_balance added to tools/browser.py: uses employer Chrome profile to scrape https://console.anthropic.com/settings/billing; regex parses balance; writes {balance_usd,fetched_at} to ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/anthropic_balance.json; same trust gate as browse_as_employer (repl/web only); logs start/complete/error to browser_use.log; registered as Tool. Syntax OK.
